base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of bubble_move — a character from 1986 legend of zelda. Bubble / Anti-Fairy — skull-with-flames. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Bubble / Anti-Fairy — skull-with-flames; 2-frame float; contact disables sword for ~5s (red variant) or permanently until blue-bubble cures
